programmes.show_description: Discover your new favourite bag from Kipling and spread the cost in four interest-free instalments too! From clever cross-bodies to terrific totes, find your next bag on offer right here.
Join us to discover some of the finest gold jewellery pieces that QVC has to offer. 9 carat, 14 carat, 18 carat; rose and white gold: explore the fabulous varieties of this most classic material.
Fall in love with Osprey London's leather goods in this show, from beautiful bags to wow-worthy wallets. Perfect gifts for loved ones or yourself, you're sure to discover something you'll adore.
Showcasing the best of the new season's accessories - from footwear to handbags and more, get all the finishing touches you'll need this spring and upgrade your look in an instant.
Update your wardrobe for the new year with gorgeous Wynne Layers fashion from MarlaWynne, featuring layering pieces, scarves and more to help give every outfit the perfect finishing touch.
Update your wardrobe for the new year with gorgeous Wynne Layers fashion from MarlaWynne, featuring layering pieces, scarves and more to help give every outfit the perfect finishing touch.
Rieker offers footwear designed to be flexible, roomy, light and well cushioned. Following trends in the marketplace, Rieker provides classic footwear to women of all ages.

Join Katy and our trusted stylists and fashion experts as we help you create your perfect wardrobe, showing you how to bring key pieces and different looks together to showcase your personal style.
Refresh your wardrobe with Ruth Langsford Seasonal Deals. Explore a hand-picked selection of stylish essentials, cosy layers and versatile pieces, all at fantastic prices.
Refresh your wardrobe with Ruth Langsford Seasonal Deals. Explore a hand-picked selection of stylish essentials, cosy layers and versatile pieces, all at fantastic prices.
Renowned for their comfort, quality and top-class design, this famous footwear brand brings a stylish collection of footwear to QVC.
Update your nightwear with our fabulous selection from some top brands. From comfy pyjamas and soft, stylish nightdresses to slouchy robes and more, we've got you covered.
Discover FitFlop, which brings you a range of bio-mechanically engineered sandals, trainers and more that support you from the ground up, so you can feel comfortable and look great all day.
Unveil your chic side with Sosandar! Discover flattering, trendy designs created for real life with longer lengths and unique styles to make you feel sexy, feminine, and confident.
Specialising in mature plants for instant impact, Plants2Gardens offer a huge array of vibrant, colourful blooms to help transform your outdoor space and bring your garden to life.

Step into Style with Sam
Join Katy and our trusted stylists and fashion experts as we help you create your perfect wardrobe, showing you how to bring key pieces and different looks together to showcase your personal style.
Easy care, easy wear, easy elegance in this mix and match collection of unique and versatile pieces created for the smart, elegant, busy women seeking comfort that doesn't compromise style.

Tune in for style advice and inspiration from Ruth, plus find everything from a great pair of jeans and a stylish jacket, to chic pieces featuring pops of colour and vibrant print.

Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.
Discover White Stuff in this show, featuring inspired fashion that combines eclectic prints, flattering shapes and fresh designs. Update your wardrobe with pieces you'll wear again and again.
Indulge yourself in our collection of fine, exquisite jewellery. Each piece in our glamorous selection epitomises the height of luxury. Go on, you deserve it!
Offering great colours, quality fabrics and exciting fashion designs for every woman. Treat yourself and go shopping with Julia Roberts!
Escape to the Cornish coast with Anouska's curated collection, inspired by sea, sky and laid-back living - bringing timeless style and relaxed charm to every day.
